the painter needed to use 48 tiles, each requiring 4 different colors of paint, which means a total of 48 x 4 = 192 color applications. each color of paint comes in bottles that can paint 10 tiles, so the painter would need 192 / 10 = 19.2 bottles, but since you can't buy a fraction of a bottle, the painter would need 20 bottles.
